one_time_description: Subsequent to year end: $35M Restoration Funds and $30M Protection Funds from Province of BC (Oct 2021); $252.6M Settlement with Government of Canada (Aug 2022) - not reflected in these statements
economic_notes: Nation has investments in Six Nations Ventures LP (16.67%), Blueberry River Enterprises LP (100%), 0851799 BC Ltd / Creever Trading Post (100%), Bluevest Contractors Inc (50%), Blueberry Economic Development Inc (100%). Industry-related funding and elders/monitors revenue from oil and gas sector monitoring. Treaty Land Entitlement negotiations ongoing with Canada. Subsequent settlement of $252.6M with Canada and $65M from BC Province after year end.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 but audit report is dated December 20, 2024 - extremely late filing. Prior year (2020) restated due to correction of error (distributions due to minors overstated by $300,000). Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Six Nations Ventures LP, Blueberry River Enterprises LP, Creever Trading Post. Long-term debt includes $1,534,720 RBC term loan plus $4,252,303 ISC Treaty Land Entitlement loans (interest-free). Major post-year-end settlements not reflected in statements: $65M from BC and $252.6M from Canada. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $4,559,689 + Other government funding $1,391,168 + First Nation Health Authority $760,461 = $6,711,318; BC Hydro $286,565 may also be a government transfer bringing total to $6,997,883. TCA net book value taken from Schedule 1 as $20,768,407 (subtotal column 2021). Deferred revenue includes ISC, FNHA, BC First Nations Gaming, and others totaling $3,365,435.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
